category_sources: Official SourceForge project page categorizes jnettop under Network Monitoring.
source_facts.description says it views hosts and ports taking the most network traffic.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title is jnettop.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available official documentation surface found and includes summary, categories, operating systems, and interface details.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project navigation links to its CVS repository, and the CVS page documents readonly repository access.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page lists Network Monitoring, System Administrators, Curses/Ncurses, and C.
source_facts.description identifies network traffic monitoring by host and port.
